en-GB.description:
SweatScore turns fitness into a game you actually want to play.

If you've tried fitness apps before and fallen off, it's not you. it's the routine. SweatScore is built around afrobeats music and movement that feels good, with a points system that keeps you coming back.

Here's how it works:

1) Join the Monthly Fitness Challenge
Every month there's a new challenge to jump into. Earn points, hit your goal, and see your name on the monthly leaderboard.

2) Build your weekly streak
Show up 5 days a week and watch your streak grow. 

3) Move With Us
Browse workouts led by creators who move like you with dance, jump rope, toning and more. Every routine earns you points.

4) Sweat with your sisters
Record duets, share your workouts, and cheer each other on in the community feed. Fitness is better together.

5) Watch your SweatScore climb
The more you show up, the higher your score. Compete monthly and see where you stand on the leaderboard.

6) Track your progress
See how consistent you've been all year round and stay motivated.

This is for you if…

You want workouts set to afrobeats music you actually love
You've tried other apps and never felt fun
You want a community that moves like you

Download SweatScore and join this month's fitness challenge.

Terms of Use - https://sweatscore.com/terms-of-use/
en-GB.releaseNotes: Track your progress all year round. See how others are progressing each month on the leaderboard.
en-GB.title: SweatScore

review.notes: This app requires OTP authentication. So please use the email id provided and then enter 0000 as OTP to login as test user.
